question_text: An electric heater has a total energy input of 5000 J. It converts 4000 J into useful heat energy and the rest is wasted as sound. Calculate the efficiency of the heater and determine what percentage of energy is wasted.
explanation: Apply the efficiency formula: useful output (4000 J) ÷ total input (5000 J) × 100% = 80%. The wasted energy is the difference (1000 J), which represents 20% of the input. This shows that 80% of the energy is used usefully and 20% is wasted as sound.
